extract: The Cold Storage (Japanese: 冷凍コンテナ Freezing Container) is a building in Pokémon Black and White found inside of an area of warehouses to the south of Driftveil City. After defeating Ghetsis, Zinzolin of the Seven Sages can be found and arrested here. During the two-year gap between Black and White and Black 2 and White 2, the facility was demolished to make room for the Pokémon World Tournament.
